body_txt: Frogs, toads and other amphibians come in a range of sizes, but are mostly tiny. The largest species are about fist-sized. In fiction, on the other hand, they tend to be scaled up. This can range from dog-sized to building-crushing — a perfect storm of threatening and disgusting. They could also be Bewitched Amphibians who keep their human size when turned into frogs. Frequently overlaps with Amphibian Assault , but not always. Some toads just wanna hang out and chill. This trope naturally crosses over into Kaiju territory as well, and indeed, more than a few giant monsters featured in media are partially or fully based on amphibians. Compare Frog Men for specific humanoid examples. Also compare Mega Neko , Giant Spider , Rodents of Unusual Size , and Big Creepy-Crawlies for other giant animal tropes, as well as Colossal Croc , The Great Serpent , and Turtle Island for other enormous reptiles and amphibians.
